meta.title: The hot new gameshow: My Favorite Metric!
meta.description: Ron Fabela and three 'celebrity' judges hear contestants' favorite ICS Cybersecurity or Cyber Risk metric. The winner got a free ticket to #S4x25. (note: the winner at S4x25 will get $2,500 in cold, hard cash.)
